description.value: Defines codes to identify discrete periods of United States military service, used to capture when an individual served in the armed forces.

copyright.value: This material derives from the HL7 Terminology (THO). THO is copyright ©1989+ Health Level Seven International and is made available under the CC0 designation. For more licensing information see: https://terminology.hl7.org/license

definition.value: Military service occurring on or after September 2001, encompassing the post-9/11 era.

display.value: August 1990 through August 2001 (including the Persian Gulf War)

definition.value: Military service occurring between August 1990 and August 2001, encompassing the Persian Gulf War era.
Military service occurring between June 1975 and July 1990.

display.value: August 1964 through May 1975 (including the Vietnam War)

definition.value: Military service occurring between August 1964 and May 1975, encompassing the Vietnam War era.
Military service occurring between February 1955 and July 1964.

display.value: June 1950 through January 1955 (including the Korean War)

definition.value: Military service occurring between June 1950 and January 1955, encompassing the Korean War era.
Military service occurring between January 1947 and May 1950.

display.value: December 1941 through December 1946 (including World War II)

definition.value: Military service occurring between December 1941 and December 1946, encompassing World War II.
Military service occurring on or before November 1941.
